facade_description: 224 Augusta Ave presents a converted house-form, semi-detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 2 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its converted house-form, semi-detached typology. The facade reads primarily as mixed in a black fascia and framing with purple patterned infill panels and gold lettering palette, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade keeps a domestic opening rhythm of 0 window bays from lower to upper levels, using storefront, and 1 principal entrance. Character-defining facade elements include cornice.
